name: Newt Gingrich
subject: a complete toss-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Ed just down by one point |
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

The Democrat running for governor of Virginia may have TWICE the cash and have dominated the airwaves with TWICE as many ads...

...But he's missing something critical that Republican Ed Gillespie has -- _a real message for the American people._

Ed Gillespie will be tough on the MS-13 international criminal gang, stop Virginia from becoming a "sanctuary" state that harbors illegal immigrants, and advance the same bold reforms President Trump is giving our country.

The race is now a complete TOSS-UP. It'll all come down to who turns out to vote. Which is why we're launching an**Emergency Grassroots Victory Fund** to ensure we get every patriot to the polls. _And if you make a contribution before 9PM TONIGHT, it will be**DOUBLE MATCHED.**_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $1 = $3 WITH DOUBLE MATCH](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=dd58318ed948b5876c057c8571859c4756a6533f092c7ee11105902d0fd6a0393dede533d80b0915e2036ed0201680e8)
Democrats have proven time and time again that they have nothing to offer our country.

They would rather tear down our history, side with Antifa rebels and American flag protesters, and obstruct the President's agenda than put ANYTHING on the table to improve the lives of American citizens.

When Americans see the clear difference between our agenda and the Left's, conservatives will always win.

But it's a matter of getting the truth about our commonsense solutions past the mainstream media filter and straight to American voters.

It's time to keep winning. And our next victory will be with Republican Ed Gillespie in Virginia.

**[Please contribute just $1 to our Emergency Grassroots Victory Fund and it will be DOUBLE MATCHED to a grand total of $3.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=dd58318ed948b587ec849e3d6bdb72411f902b8578e9c50900ba44f12132fdc5712f32753cbe1753760546c2b5d7a216)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ba3b3f18c609293cf7e0b7c77563c66b282edec2d6436d0b72a00c561cb7dc68a2367e36899aee985a3245f961958b1)
Newt Gingrich
[CONTRIBUTE $1 = $3 WITH DOUBLE MATCH](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=dd58318ed948b5876c057c8571859c4756a6533f092c7ee11105902d0fd6a0393dede533d80b0915e2036ed0201680e8)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ba3b3f18c609293f947d4ac097236f254203febc4862e06d9fde058c770504e44a4496c4b99a82d5224df315c52f9a5) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ba3b3f18c6092937a44bf33f42737ccfb43316de1dee912b806e57b8e7e8edda5590b811d0e8fb797f27cce243d4e1d) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22abb6f67f2c0108e4478e936ce1c08ab719c96639a3287dcff5e7ff2e0ce47386431d3f424cd6670d32) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d48467251e4ab4bd4e5a4d2aaa1404dbde069029aeb8205efdedf)

name: contests@dscc.org
subject: You're invited: Lunch with Hillary Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Democrats from across the country have already entered our contest to have see Hillary Clinton LIVE in New York. -- but there's still time to throw your hat in the ring!
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-conference-contest?refcode=DPE-20171105-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Team, Hillary Clinton remembers that the DSCC was there for her the first time that she ran for the Senate.

So she's joining us for a very special lunch in New York to share what it means to have MORE (not less) women in the Senate -- and we're going to send one lucky supporter to New York for the event (flight and hotel are on us)!

[**Just chip in any amount before midnight tonight and you 'll be automatically entered for your chance to join Hillary Clinton for this lunch!>>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-conference-contest?refcode=DPE-20171105-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-conference-contest?refcode=DPE-20171105-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Here's what you could win, team:

* ✔ A lunch to remember featuring Hillary Clinton
* ✔ Roundtrip travel to New York City
* ✔ Hotel accommodations in the city that never sleeps

This is an opportunity you don't want to miss -- _plus_ , your contribution will go toward electing MORE women to the Senate!

**We 'll take care of all the details, team. So what are you waiting for? Enter today:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/Hillary-Clinton-lunch**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-conference-contest?refcode=DPE-20171105-Contests_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Contributions or gifts to DSCC are not tax deductible. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents, who are legal residents of 50 United States, the District of Columbia, or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Entries must be received between November 2 and November 5, 2017. You may enter by contributing at [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-conference-contest](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dcd0/2b07114c/f2ecde9d/7317b1e1/1265477921/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-conference-contest"). Alternatively, you can enter without contributing by clicking here: [https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/wsn-trip-contest](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dcd0/2b07114c/f2ecde9d/7317b1e0/1265477921/VEsA/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/wsn-trip-contest"). One winner will be selected to attend the Women's Senate Network Conference and will receive the following prize package: a round-trip ticket within the continental U.S. to New York, N.Y., hotel accommodations for one, and attendance at the Women's Senate Network Conference (approximate retail value of prize package $1,600). Odds of winning depend on number of eligible entries received. All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules:[http://www.dscc.org/wsn-trip-contest-rules/](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dcd0/2b07114c/f2ecde9d/7317b1e3/1265477921/VEsB/ "http://www.dscc.org/wsn-trip-contest-rules/"). Sponsor: DSCC, 120 Maryland Ave NE, Washington, DC 20002.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dcd0/2b07114c/f2ecde9d/7317b1e2/1265477921/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dcd0/2b07114c/f2ecde9d/7317b1dd/1265477921/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dcd0/2b07114c/f2ecde9d/7317b1dc/1265477921/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Team DWS
subject: ❗ One-year warning ❗
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Monday marks exactly one year until Election Day 2018. **And one thing's for sure -- we have a LOT of work to do before then.** Debbie has four opponents and special interests who are already on the attack. If we want Debbie to come out ahead, we need to make each of the next 365 days count. [_**Let Debbie know you're all-in to fight by her side from now through Election Day.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e67/622b7b5b/7048ab1/307bad79/2813777099/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171103") | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e67/622b7b5b/7048ab1/307bad79/2813777099/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171103")
---
Debbie is one of the most outspoken opponents of Trump and his entire agenda. It makes her an incredible advocate for South Florida families. **But it also makes her a major thorn in the Republicans' sides.**
[_**Help let her know that for the next year, we're ready to put in whatever work it takes to help her win this election. Add your name >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e67/622b7b5b/7048ab1/307bad79/2813777099/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171103")
We're all in. We hope you're with us!
Team DWS
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e67/622b7b5b/7048ab1/307bad78/2813777099/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Team Vogel
subject: Fight the smears
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,
Polls are tied, less than two days remain, and the opposition is desperate.
I am sure you saw the hateful and despicable truck ad from the Soros-funded Latino Victory Fund which attacked Ed Gillespie and smeared conservative men as racists.
Justin Fairfax refused to condemn the ad. Twice. He claimed he hadn't seen it 48 hours after it became the top story in the news cycle. Did the dog eat his homework too?
Here's the truth: LVF is contributing thousands to his campaign and we're not buying the excuse that he missed days of news coverage about his contributor's ad.
[Jill is fighting the smears with a powerful new ad calling out Justin Fairfax and the Democrats who stand by this despicable attack. Watch Jill's ad here.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RSBVZ5_VaZwYD6qM9W6G_4zxmXlAMk2_l-hOlGdVFMEaW0gC8PcgxkCiISucAM9_iKf_ORuFZ2zqG8_M2p4gA9ZB0v9u7yUyYtTXYhQWpERHj192wbo9Qf-kDDkf4uBbE13ckDM2cQlYQOpR686xbkaSVmVofoSasn7vn61Tw9v2I2r-YF0L1Z16Ybph5xnE5Q1kmO8TwgKDjKt-_XL9Fg==&c=_xRa7n3O9W6iSCSZH1-xWpsP77HbOVCJvE4RQSpTXJIoFue6b4zenQ==&ch=xIIgihv-QanDB5ikVVa1dSfRvvbZpBIn8afM9BqXpXx5LwxXxb138Q==)
That's why we need your help. We need to raise an additional $25,000 to run Jill's response ad all across Virginia.
[Can you rush us an online contribution right now so we can buy more ad time?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RSBVZ5_VaZwYD6qM9W6G_4zxmXlAMk2_l-hOlGdVFMEaW0gC8Pcgxnae7DninfPYI-FVrVHmYrRci0JW0fGJCVsne0d9FWq_mV2j5d6eSkKAOXa9JljUoC8cqwjF10HAPzvfu28xxyy1APJv-LFfBunroyhA39In897Yygy4G_0=&c=_xRa7n3O9W6iSCSZH1-xWpsP77HbOVCJvE4RQSpTXJIoFue6b4zenQ==&ch=xIIgihv-QanDB5ikVVa1dSfRvvbZpBIn8afM9BqXpXx5LwxXxb138Q==)
Jill's response ad fighting the smears is so important that a group of our supporters is offering to double-match donations which come in tonight towards our goal.
---
| | | [$25 Becomes $75 >>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RSBVZ5_VaZwYD6qM9W6G_4zxmXlAMk2_l-hOlGdVFMEaW0gC8Pcgxnae7DninfPYI-FVrVHmYrRci0JW0fGJCVsne0d9FWq_mV2j5d6eSkKAOXa9JljUoC8cqwjF10HAPzvfu28xxyy1APJv-LFfBunroyhA39In897Yygy4G_0=&c=_xRa7n3O9W6iSCSZH1-xWpsP77HbOVCJvE4RQSpTXJIoFue6b4zenQ==&ch=xIIgihv-QanDB5ikVVa1dSfRvvbZpBIn8afM9BqXpXx5LwxXxb138Q==)
---

Let's keep Jill's ad going strong by meeting our $25,000 goal.
Are you in?

Sincerely,
Team Vogel

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Polls are tied, less than two days remain, and the opposition is desperate. I am sure you saw the hateful and despicable truck ad from the Soros-funded Latino Victory Fund which attacked Ed Gillespie and smeared conservative men as racists. Justin Fairfax refused to condemn the ad. Twice. He claimed he hadn't seen it 48 hours after it became the top story in the news cycle. Did the dog eat his homework too? Here's the truth: LVF is contributing thousands to his campaign and we're not buying the excuse that he missed days of news coverage about his contributor's ad. == That's why we need your help. We need to raise an additional $25,000 to run Jill's response ad all across Virginia. == Jill's response ad fighting the smears is so important that a group of our supporters is offering to double-match donations which come in tonight towards our goal. | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | It's time for conservatives to take a stand and fight the smears. Let's keep Jill's ad going strong by meeting our $25,000 goal. Are you in? Sincerely, Team Vogel | == | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == | | Vogel for Virginia | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@vogelforvirginia.com in collaboration with |
